questionHtml:
A large school has students from Year 6 to Year 12.

A group of 80 students in Year 12 were randomly selected and surveyed to find out how many hours per week they each spend doing homework. Their results are represented by the following cumulative frequency graph.

Given that 10% of these Year 12 students spend more than k hours per week doing homework, find the value of k.
markschemeHtml:
recognizing there are 8 students in the top 10%             (M1)

72 students spent less than k hours             (A1)

k=18 (hours)           A1

 

[3 marks]

meta.title: Given that 10% of these Year 12 students spend more than k hours per week doing homework, find the value of k.
